description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build x86 Linux Wheels (ROCm) that triggers on pull requests, pushes to specific branches (nightly, main, release candidate branches) and tags (release candidate tags, version tags), and on workflow dispatch. The workflow generates a build matrix for Linux wheel generation with ROCm enabled, then uses this matrix to build and upload PyTorch FBGEMM wheels, handling concurrency by cancelling in-progress jobs.
